sectiondef.header: RPDO service: the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400-0x15ff) modification using SDO

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400)

detaileddescription.para: When the download indication function for the object 0x1400 is called with a non-zero abort code
Then the same abort code value is returned, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with a sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When a value longer than the sub-object's data type length is downloaded to the sub-object
Then CO_SDO_AC_TYPE_LEN_HI abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with no sub-object at a given sub-index

detaileddescription.para: When any value is downloaded to the sub-index
Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_SUB abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "Highest sub-index supported" sub-object (0x00)

detaileddescription.para: When any value is downloaded to the sub-object
Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_WRITE abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "COB-ID used by RPDO" sub-object (0x01)

detaileddescription.para: When the same value as the current sub-object's value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object remains unchanged calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "COB-ID used by RPDO" sub-object (0x01) set to a valid COB-ID

detaileddescription.para: When a valid COB-ID with a different CAN-ID is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "COB-ID used by RPDO" sub-object (0x01) set to an invalid COB-ID

detaileddescription.para: When a valid COB-ID with a different CAN-ID is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls can_recv_start() calls can_timer_stop() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "COB-ID used by RPDO" sub-object (0x01) set to a valid COB-ID

detaileddescription.para: When an invalid COB-ID with the same CAN-ID is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls can_recv_stop() calls can_timer_stop() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "COB-ID used by RPDO" sub-object (0x01) set to a valid COB-ID

detaileddescription.para: When the same valid COB-ID, but with the CO_PDO_COBID_FRAME bit set is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls can_recv_start() calls can_timer_stop() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "COB-ID used by RPDO" sub-object (0x01)

detaileddescription.para: When an invalid COB-ID with the 29-bit Extended Identifier, but with no CO_PDO_COBID_FRAME bit set is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "COB-ID used by RPDO" sub-object (0x01) set to a valid COB-ID and the "Event timer" sub-object (0x05) set to a non-zero value

detaileddescription.para: When an invalid COB-ID is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service; the event timer is stopped calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls can_recv_stop() calls can_timer_stop() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "COB-ID used by RPDO" sub-object (0x01) set to an invalid COB-ID and the "Event timer" sub-object (0x05) set to a non-zero value

detaileddescription.para: When a valid COB-ID is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service; the event timer is started calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls can_recv_start() calls can_timer_stop() calls can_timer_timeout() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "Transmission type" sub-object (0x02)

detaileddescription.para: When the same value as the current sub-object's value is downloaded to the sub-object
Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "Transmission type" sub-object (0x02)

detaileddescription.para: When a reserved transmission type value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "Transmission type" sub-object (0x02)

detaileddescription.para: When a transmission type value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "Transmission type" sub-object (0x02)

detaileddescription.para: When the maximum transmission type value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "Inhibit time" sub-object (0x03)

detaileddescription.para: When the same value as the current sub-object's value is downloaded to the sub-object
Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u16()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "Inhibit time" sub-object (0x03); the RPDO is valid

detaileddescription.para: When a time value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u16()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "Inhibit time" sub-object (0x03); the RPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a time value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u16() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "Compatibility entry" sub-object (0x04)

detaileddescription.para: When any value is downloaded to the sub-object
Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_SUB abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "Event timer" sub-object (0x05)

detaileddescription.para: When the same value as the current sub-object's value is downloaded to the sub-object
Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u16()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "Event timer" sub-object (0x05); the event timer is enabled

detaileddescription.para: When a new timer value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value; the event timer is updated and restarted calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u16() calls can_timer_stop() calls can_timer_timeout() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1400) with the "Event timer" sub-object (0x05); the event timer is enabled

detaileddescription.para: When a zero timer value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value; the event timer is stopped and disabled calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u16() calls can_timer_stop() calls co_sub_dn()

sectiondef.header: RPDO service: the RPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1600-0x17fff) modification using SDO

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1600)

detaileddescription.para: When the download indication function for the object 0x1600 is called with a non-zero abort code
Then the same abort code value is returned, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1600) with a sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When a value longer than the sub-object's data type length is downloaded to the sub-object
Then CO_SDO_AC_TYPE_LEN_HI abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1600) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00)

detaileddescription.para: When the same value as the current sub-object's value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object remains unchanged calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1600) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00); the RPDO is valid

detaileddescription.para: When any value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1600) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00); the RPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a value larger than CO_PDO_NUM_MAPS is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1600) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) and an "Application object" entry with an empty mapping; the RPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a new number of mapped objects value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8() calls co_dev_chk_rpdo() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1600) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) and an "Application object" entry with a mapping that exceeds the maximum PDO length; the RPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a new number of mapped objects value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PDO_LEN abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1600) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) and an "Application object" entry that maps into a non-existing object; the RPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a new number of mapped objects value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_OBJ abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8() calls co_dev_chk_rpdo()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1600) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00); the RPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a zero value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1600) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) and some "Application object" entires; the RPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a non-zero value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8() calls co_dev_chk_rpdo() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1600) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) equal to zero and with an "Application object" sub-object (0x01-0x40); the RPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When the same value as the current sub-object's value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object remains unchanged calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1600) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) equal to zero and with an "Application object" sub-object (0x01-0x40); the RPDO is valid

detaileddescription.para: When a new mapping value is downloaded to the "Application object" sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1600) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) does not equal zero and with an "Application object" sub-object (0x01-0x40); the RPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a new mapping value is downloaded to the "Application object" sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1600) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) equal to zero and with an "Application object" sub-object (0x01-0x40); the RPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When an empty mapping value is downloaded to the "Application object" sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls co_dev_chk_rpdo() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1600) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) equal to zero and with an "Application object" sub-object (0x01-0x40); the RPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a mapping that maps into a non-existing object is downloaded to the "Application object" sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_OBJ abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls co_dev_chk_rpdo()

briefdescription.para: Given a started RPDO service (co_rpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the RPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1600) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) equal to zero and with an "Application object" sub-object (0x01-0x40); the RPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a new mapping value is downloaded to the "Application object" sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls co_dev_chk_rpdo() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: This file is part of the CANopen Library Unit Test Suite.

detaileddescription.para:
